job_description: We are seeking a highly experienced Data Architect to design and implement enterprise-scale data architectures in cloud environments.
requirements: 10+ years of experience in data engineering, data architecture, or a related technical role, with strong proficiency in enterprise architecture, data and software engineering.
Proven experience designing and implementing enterprise-scale data architectures in cloud environments (e.g., GCP, AWS, or Azure).
Deep understanding of data warehousing, data lakes, and modern data stack tools (e.g., BigQuery, Snowflake, Airflow, dbt, Fivetran, Looker).
Ability to create scalable designs capable of supporting high workloads and large numbers of simultaneous users, processes and integrations.
Strong knowledge of master data management, data governance, metadata management, data lineage, and security best practices.
Fluent designing and working with various data types including structured, semi-structured, and unstructured data.
Ability to implement operational monitoring and alerting for all aspects of the system.
Proven experience designing and implementing CI/CD, and DevOps practices in data environments.
Adept at designing highly scalable, distributed and fault tolerant data architectures ensuring full high availability and disaster recovery capabilities.
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to align technical solutions with business needs.
A strategic mindset with a strong sense of ownership, accountability, and a drive to build future-proof systems.
